creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
Hello. I am using vt and I have tried these sysctls below.

% tail -n 2 /etc/sysctl.conf
hw.syscons.bell=1
kern.vt.enable_bell=1

In each of these, i was unable to ring the bell via "echo -e \a" or by hitting the backspace key. My sound works on both X11 and TTY (tested with "beep" command).

Thanks in advance.
